extortion.description: [AI generated] Barrett Distribution is a third-party logistics provider that offers warehousing, transportation and international logistics solutions. The family-owned business, founded in 1941, is headquartered in Franklin, Massachusetts. Their supply chain services span multiple industries including apparel, consumer electronics, food and beverage, footwear, health and beauty, and home furnishings. Barrett strives for operational excellence and maintains high safety and quality standards.
